findings.summary: Game Boy clone (70 components). U4 regulator Vout estimated 1.659V but net labeled 3.3V (Vref assumption wrong). RC filter R11/C19 has output==ground anomaly. 2 regulators and 1 crystal correctly detected.

incorrect.description: U4 regulator Vout estimated 1.659V but net labeled 3.3V - Vref assumption wrong in feedback divider calculation
RC filter R11/C19 has output==ground anomaly

suggestions: Verify Vref assumptions against actual regulator datasheet
Flag RC filters where output net equals ground
